security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.telegram.org https://api.anthropic.com http://localhost:11434 http://127.0.0.1:11434 https://api.github.com https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com

bundle.longDescription: Mr. Moneypenny is a privacy-first FOSS personal-budgeting app. You log expenses by chatting with a personal Telegram bot powered by your choice of Claude API or local Ollama. All data lives on your computer; the project operates no servers.
